_comment: Services that MUST NOT be disabled. Refuse without --iknowwhatimdoing. Include the reason for each.

services.RpcSs: Remote Procedure Call — the entire OS talks over this
services.DcomLaunch: DCOM Server Process Launcher — RPC dependency
services.PlugPlay: Plug and Play — no devices come online without it
services.EventLog: Windows Event Log — cascading failures if killed
services.gpsvc: Group Policy Client — login lockout if disabled
services.Themes: Visual styles — logon hangs without it
services.ProfSvc: User Profile Service — profile load failure = no login
services.CryptSvc: Cryptographic Services — WU + code signing + TLS
services.BFE: Base Filtering Engine — required by Windows Firewall
services.MpsSvc: Windows Firewall — do not disable, add rules instead
services.LanmanWorkstation: SMB client — needed to access shares OR your own machine's admin shares
services.Dhcp: DHCP client — you'll lose your IP
services.Dnscache: DNS client cache — DNS still works but Chrome/Edge misbehave
services.NlaSvc: Network Location Awareness — firewall profile selection
services.AudioSrv: Windows Audio — mute everything if disabled
services.AudioEndpointBuilder: Audio endpoint enumeration — Windows Audio dependency
services.Schedule: Task Scheduler — your automation dies without it
services.TrustedInstaller: Windows Modules Installer — WU + optional features
services.wuauserv: Windows Update — do not disable, use policy to control instead
services.sppsvc: Software Protection — activation. Shows Auto/Stopped normally; that's correct.
services.KeyIso: CNG Key Isolation — keys used by BitLocker etc
